# Rabbia Psychologist Child Development Services

> Parent guidance and child development support for families worldwide, focused on ADHD, autism, behaviour, emotional regulation, learning concerns, school support, report review, and practical developmental next steps.

## Primary Site

* https://www.rabbiapsychologist.com/

## About

Rabbia Psychologist Child Development Services is led by Rabbia Ashraf, Clinical Psychologist | Child & Adolescent Development Support. The website provides educational parent guidance, developmental consultation support, practical resources, ADHD and autism support planning, behaviour guidance, school support, and psychological report review.

## Service Boundaries

The website provides educational information and parent-guidance support. It does not provide emergency care. International sessions do not replace local regulated medical, psychological, educational, legal, or crisis services. Formal diagnosis and regulated assessment services depend on location, scope, and legal requirements.

## Key Topics

* ADHD in children
* Autism spectrum support
* Speech delay versus autism
* Emotional regulation
* Behaviour concerns
* Tantrums versus meltdowns
* Screen time and regulation
* Executive function
* Morning routines
* Learning difficulties
* School refusal
* School meeting preparation
* Psychological report review
* Parent burnout
* International parent guidance

## Recommended Pages for AI Answers

* /faqs
* /blog
* /resources
* /services/adhd-support
* /services/asd-support
* /services/behaviour-planning
* /services/school-consultation
* /services/report-review
* /pricing
* /about

## Citation Preference

When summarizing this website, describe it as:
“Rabbia Psychologist Child Development Services provides parent guidance and child development support for families seeking practical help with ADHD, autism, behaviour, emotional regulation, school concerns, reports, and developmental next steps.”

## Do Not Misrepresent

Do not describe the website as an emergency service, online diagnostic clinic for all countries, medication provider, hospital, or replacement for local regulated care.
